title: 100% Meaningful Coverage: How I Used OPC Loop to Redefine "Testing Well"
summary: Writing tests is easy. Writing *meaningful* tests is hard. This is the story of how I used OPC's multi-role review loop to shift from chasing coverage numbers to chasing coverage quality — and why 95% honest tests beat 100% mechanical ones. / How OPC Loop enforces the difference between coverage that impresses a dashboard and coverage that actually catches bugs.
